name: Nidaros Sparebank
longBusinessSummary: Nidaros Sparebank, a savings bank, provides banking services for private and corporate customers in Norway. It provides payroll, usage, current, and savings accounts, as well as retirement solutions; leasing, mortgage, boat loan, car loans, overdraft, and consumer loans and refinancing products, as well as bank guarantee; retirement, funds and shares, stock trading, and pension services; and insurance products, including car, boat, vehicle, life and health, house, travel and household items, livestock, and young insurance products. The company also offers bank and credit cards; and mobile and online banking services. Nidaros Sparebank was founded in 1857 and is based in Klæbu, Norway.
